_README: Manual overrides for items the pipeline gets wrong. Keyed by decorID (string). Fields here overwrite the enriched item dict. Use _note for documentation. Field names must match what output_catalog_lua.py reads: sources (array), achievement, vendor, quest, zone, npcX, npcY, npcID, faction, etc.

7690._note: Altar of the Corrupted Flames — in-game dump tagged as Vendor but this actually requires the Broken Isles World Quests V achievement

839._note: Inert Blight Canister — vendor in Dazar'alor, not broad Zuldazar

932._note: Forsaken War Planning Table — vendor in Dazar'alor

937._note: Large Forsaken War Tent — vendor in Dazar'alor

938._note: Small Forsaken War Tent — vendor in Dazar'alor

940._note: Blightfire Hanging Lantern — vendor in Dazar'alor

943._note: Undercity Spiked Chest — vendor (Captain Zen'taga) in Dazar'alor

949._note: Large Forsaken Spiked Brazier — vendor (Provisioner Mukra) in Dazar'alor
